case_title: KANDL, TOMAS et al VS MCCLELLAN-BURKHARDT, THERESE E.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLELLAN-BURKHARDT, THERESE E.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY KANDL, TOMAS ZHANG, ALEXA AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLELLAN-BURKHARDT, THERESE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANDL, TOMAS ZHANG, ALEXA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLELLAN-BURKHARDT, THERESE E. $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,180.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5, AND THEREFORE MAY NOT DEDUCT FROM PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT MAY PURSUE INDEPENDENT ACTION FOR ANY CLAIM FOR RENT OR OTHER DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED; SENT TO ACOUNTING FOR PROCESSING.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT(FOR COURT USE ONLY): FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO J. DEBTOR: MCCLELLAN-BURKHARDT, THERESE E. (30 DAYS PASSED).
